faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Floral Park typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method chosen. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes for all Floral Park properties before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Floral Park home?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Floral Park homes take 4-8 hours for initial service, depending on home size and infestation severity. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 visits spaced 10-14 days apart to eliminate all life stages of bed bugs.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. For chemical treatments, we recommend a 4-6 hour absence from treated areas. Heat treatments are chemical-free and safe to return to immediately after completion.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment service in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We provide a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Floral Park. If bed bugs return within the warranty period (typically 30-90 days depending on treatment type), we will re-treat your home at no additional charge. Our goal is complete elimination and your total satisfaction.
